<@&1430676924564508824> 
# Important for trading options
To clear up a few things about my trades/alerts for the new VIPs, here’s how I operate so everyone’s on the same page:

***• I mainly trade QQQ and only 0DTEs.***
If I plan to trade anything else, I’ll give a heads-up before market open.

***• I trade within the first 10 minutes of market open.***
These prices are extremely volatile and move within seconds.

***• If you want to trade with me, be prepared.***
Have your brokerage open and the QQQ options chain ready before market opens.
If you’re not ready the moment the ping drops, don’t enter late - the move is usually gone.

***• My typical take-profit is around 25% of the current holdings each time.***
I trade with hundreds of contracts, so I always leave runners.
If you’re trading smaller size, whether you leave runners is up to you.

***• After taking profits, I move my stop to breakeven.***

***• If you cannot actively monitor the trade, please don’t enter.***
These 0DTE QQQ contracts move FAST - they require your full attention.

***• DO. NOT. OVERLEVERAGE.***
Yes, we’ve been on an insane run, but that does NOT mean increase your size.
I’ve been trading for 10+ years with a 57% win rate - hot streaks happen, and so do cold streaks.

You don’t want to win 5 trades just to blow it all on one oversized losing trade.
Stay consistent with your sizing. Protect your account.
## From here on out, ill be alerting my entries/take profits/exits like this to color code it for fast reactions and easier visuals:

<@&1430676924564508824> Hey everyone! 
Just a quick introduction, I’ll be posting all of my plays here in this channel. I typically trade 10–45 minutes after market open, and occasionally in the afternoon as well. I mainly trade QQQ/SPY options, with the occasional TSLA/NVDA play. My trades usually lasts **minutes**.

I’ve been trading for quite some time and have maintained a 57% win rate over the years. Please remember: **I lose a lot too**, so make sure you’re trading responsibly. I personally allocate **0.5%–1%** per trade to avoid being over-leveraged.

I’ll always post my **exact entries and exits.**
During market hours,** I won’t be able to answer many questions** in VIP chats since I also manage my own community. If a trade starts going south, please don’t spam me with questions — I will always alert my exits.

Let’s make some money and stay disciplined! 💰
*(None of my trades are financial advice — trade responsibly.)*
